name: MUST-SEE (via DSCC)
subject: ONE tote bag to re-elect TEN female Senators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Don't miss out, team! This limited-edition "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag is going fast AND helps re-elect the ten female Democratic Senators who are up for re-election.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20170903-MustSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Our limited-edition "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bags are going FAST, team -- and we don't want you to miss out!

This tote bag not only shows the world what you stand for, but it helps the Women's Senate Network re-elect a HISTORIC number of women to the Senate.

[**So before time runs out, claim your Women 's Senate Network tote bag with a gift of $35 or more today -- and we'll even pay for shipping! Get yours now >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20170903-MustSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20170903-MustSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

This year there are TEN Democratic women Senators up for re-election -- nearly HALF of all women in the Senate. Your gift to the Women's Senate Network will help us send champions like Elizabeth Warren, Claire McCaskill, Kirsten Gillibrand, Tammy Baldwin, and Mazie Hirono back to the Senate!

With the GOP gearing up to defund Planned Parenthood by the end of the year, having more women in the Senate has never been more important.

[**Can we count on you to help AND score your very own "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag today? Don't miss out, team. Order yours here >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20170903-MustSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for standing with us,

Team DSCC

P.S. Already ordered a tote bag? Don't worry! We are processing your order. **[You can click here to order a second tote bag now.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20170903-MustSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d80b/2b07114c/1a5c779f/73137cb1/3454091311/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d80b/2b07114c/1a5c779f/73137cb0/3454091311/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d80b/2b07114c/1a5c779f/73137cb3/3454091311/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

subject: Defend DACA (add your name)
body:

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052369e/4067b0a/3e80c2c7b/7e6e98a3/554204957/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170815_dnc_nd&source=em_20170815_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Trump turning NAFTA into a corporate power grab (sign the petition)
body:
Replace NAFTA: No more pro-corporate trade deals (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/)

Petition to U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer:
"Do not use the pro-corporate Trans-Pacific Partnership as a starting point in your efforts to renegotiate the North American Free Trade Agreement. In an open and transparent negotiating process, eliminate the investor-state dispute settlement system that surrenders sovereignty to corporate power, include strong and enforceable labor and environmental standards, require all imports to meet the strongest domestic safety standards, reinforce Buy American and Buy Local policies, and remove rules that drive up drug prices by allowing pharmaceutical monopolies."

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/)

Dear Activist,

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/)

As millions of Americans celebrate the accomplishments of the labor movement this Labor Day, Team Trump is moving forward with its plan to renegotiate the North American Free Trade Agreement, commonly known as NAFTA, which began last month.

But like most Trump gambits, this could be another chance to hand over more power to wealthy investors and out-of-control mega-corporations. The Trump administration plan seems to be to use populist rhetoric as a cover while using the Trans-Pacific Partnership (TPP) as a template to incorporate additional job-destroying and environment-trashing provisions into NAFTA.1

Time to call the administration's bluff. That is why we are teaming up with our friends at Public Citizen to make it absolutely clear what a renegotiated NAFTA should look like – and dare the Trump team to either produce a good deal or betray their pro-corporate interests.

Tell Trump administration: Don’t turn NAFTA into the TPP. Click here to sign the petition (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/) .

So far, the Trump administration is being secretive and opaque, revealing little about its plans or who will benefit. What Americans want is a trade deal that stops the ongoing bleeding from NAFTA while also adding new protections for our environment, creating jobs and raising wages. Any NAFTA renegotiation must:

Institute a democratic, accountable and transparent negotiating process that doesn’t give corporate interests special access or seats at the table. Eliminate the investor-state dispute settlement system, which surrenders U.S. sovereignty to multinational corporations that can sue our government before a tribunal of three corporate lawyers – ordering taxpayers to pay corporations unlimited sums of money for the loss of expected future profits, especially if they think protections for workers or the environment might undermine corporate NAFTA privileges. Include strong and enforceable environmental and labor standards – not the useless rules in deals like the TPP. Require all imports meet our safety rules, including environmental and labor protections on imported food, goods and services. Preserve Buy American and Buy Local policies, eliminating NAFTA’s waivers that allow companies to offshore our tax dollars instead of reinvesting them to create jobs here. Remove rules that drive up drug prices by allowing pharmaceutical companies extended monopolies on drug patents.
If the Trump administration fails to meet these standards, then their much-ballyhooed NAFTA renegotiation is just another example of using phony populism to cover corporate power grabs.

Tell Trump administration: Don’t turn NAFTA into the TPP. Click here to sign the petition (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/) .

Already, Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross is claiming that the disastrous TPP is the “starting point” for talks with Mexico and Canada.2 The Trump administration has been reassuring business leaders that their NAFTA renegotiation will not hurt industry – a worrisome sign that Trump is once again trying to hide a corporate power grab behind populist rhetoric.

If the Trump administration follows through on the principles we laid out above it will result in a progressive trade treaty that represents a big win for workers, the environment and all Americans. The likely scenario is that it abandons workers, consumers, and environment in our local communities in favor of big corporations and Wall Street, we will be able to expose Trump and his administration as craven crony capitalists masquerading as faux populists.

Tell Trump administration: Don’t turn NAFTA into the TPP. Click the link below to add your name:

https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/ (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/)

Thank you for speaking out. Your activism matters.

Murshed Zaheed, Political Director
CREDO Action from Working Assets (http://www.credoaction.com)

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/)

References:

David Dayen, “Trump’s Renegotiation of NAFTA Is Starting to Look a Lot Like the TPP (https://www.thenation.com/article/trumps-renegotiation-of-nafta-is-starting-to-look-a-lot-like-the-tpp/) ,” The Nation, July 18, 2017. Daniel Marans, “At Pro-Trade Think Tank, Wilbur Ross Soothes Business Fears Over NAFTA Talks (http://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/wilbur-ross-nafta-tpp-starting-point_us_592f5cefe4b0540ffc845387) ,” HuffPost, May 31, 2017.

(http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/?source=fb_share4&referring_akid= {{user.token}}) Share on Facebook
Post to your wall (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://act.credoaction.com/sign/Replace_NAFTA_dems/?source=fb_share4&referring_akid= {{user.token}}) Tweet this
Post to Twitter (https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?&text=Tell%20%40USTradeRep%3A%20Don%27t%20turn%20NAFTA%20into%20TPP%20http%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2F2tfV7pT%20via%20%40CREDOMobile%20%23resist%0A)
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTk2LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMTM5ODk5NTM1

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: New Hampshire Republican Party
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester calls on Federal Delegation to Denounce Buckley Smears
body:
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Calls on Federal Delegation to Denounce Buckley Smears**
Concord- NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester has released the following statement following a reckless escalation of rhetoric from New Hampshire Democrats:
"Last month, after the State Republican Party was targeted by vandals, we called for a meaningful change in political rhetoric and a reset of our political dialogue. While many of us were joining with President Trump for a National Day of Prayer, New Hampshire Democrat Party Chair Ray Buckley smeared over 15,000 patriotic Granite Staters, calling them ‘white supremacists.’ This is a despicable. Jeanne Shaheen, Maggie Hassan, Annie Kuster, and Carol Shea-Porter must condemn this incendiary rhetoric immediately.”

###
**BACKGROUND:**
WMUR - Former Trump campaign staffers to launch new organization in NH

clean_body: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Calls on Federal Delegation to Denounce Buckley Smears Concord- NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester has released the following statement following a reckless escalation of rhetoric from New Hampshire Democrats: "Last month, after the State Republican Party was targeted by vandals, we called for a meaningful change in political rhetoric and a reset of our political dialogue. While many of us were joining with President Trump for a National Day of Prayer, New Hampshire Democrat Party Chair Ray Buckley smeared over 15,000 patriotic Granite Staters, calling them ‘white supremacists.’ This is a despicable. Jeanne Shaheen, Maggie Hassan, Annie Kuster, and Carol Shea-Porter must condemn this incendiary rhetoric immediately.” BACKGROUND: WMUR - Former Trump campaign staffers to launch new organization in NH | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 \--UNSUBSCRIBEALT--

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: Our commitment to the workers
body:
#
Friends,
As we enjoy an extended Labor Day weekend with friends and family, it is important to reflect on the meaning of this holiday and what it represents for the future of our country and the political revolution we are building. This particular Labor Day marks the continuation of the assault on workers rights at the state and federal levels. The new members of the National Labor Relations Board now constitute a majority that rejects in principle the preamble of the 80-year-old statue: "promote collective bargaining rights." And at the state level, led by right wing think tanks concluding their meeting this very week end, the assault continues on the rights of public workers.
Sen. Bernie Sanders has led the way in opposing the policies of the corporate establishment that have favored tax breaks to the detriment of the employees that built those companies. Trade deals like NAFTA, CAFTA, and permanent normal trade relations with China have hollowed out our middle class and shipped millions of jobs away from American manufacturing while degrading our environment. While Bernie and others fight the good fight in Congress, they cannot fix these issues without a mass movement of working class Americans-- Black, Brown, and White.
NAFTA alone has cost our economy approximately one million jobs and lowered living standards for workers in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. It is time we reverse the loss of jobs and re-center workers in the negotiation of our trade agreements. [**Sign our petition to replace NAFTA with a trade agreement that makes corporations play by our rules, not their own. We demand better wages, better jobs, and better care for our environment.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa7/bed43eb/7bbfc81/75ffab87/2651459076/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/nafta?source=em170904-subc")
The labor movement has brought Americans improved living standards including forty hour work weeks, the minimum wage and for those with bargaining rights much more. These conditions are under attack every day. Today we are fighting for fifteen bucks and a union, the right of all people to have health care, and to earn decent wages without fearing one's job being shipped overseas.
Donald Trump has promised to renegotiate NAFTA to favor American workers, but his bluster and bombast has not been matched by his actions. His administration is populated by Wall Street executives and corporate leaders that have repeatedly turned their backs on the working people who built this country.
Radical change will not come from the powers that be. In the spirit of Labor Day and the movement that brought it into being, let's show our country that the grassroots and everyday American workers deserve better. [**Add your name to our petition calling for a renegotiation of NAFTA with a new trade agreement that benefits people and our planet.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa7/bed43eb/7bbfc81/75ffab87/2651459076/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/nafta?source=em170904-subc")
I am proud that Our Revolution members and our partners already have more than 100,000 petition signers. Together, we can release our economy from the grip of the oligarchy and ensure prosperity for all. Thank you for doing your part.
In Solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chairman
Our Revolution
Past President Communications Workers of America

**[SIGN THE PETITION»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa7/bed43eb/7bbfc81/75ffab87/2651459076/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/nafta?source=em170904-subc")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa7/bed43eb/7bbfc81/75ffab86/2651459076/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa7/bed43eb/7bbfc81/75ffab81/2651459076/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa7/bed43eb/7bbfc81/75ffab80/2651459076/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afa7/bed43eb/7bbfc81/75ffab83/2651459076/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
